description.en: This class can be used to generate HTML calendars. HTMLCalendar instances have the following methods: formatmonth(theyear, themonth, withyear=True)¶ Return a month’s calendar as an HTML table. If withyear is true the year will be included in the header, otherwise just the month name will be used. formatyear(theyear, width=3)¶ Return a year’s calendar as an HTML table. width (defaulting to 3) specifies the number of months per row. formatyearpage(theyear, width=3, css='calendar.css', encoding=...
